reviews.review_title: Get this game if you don’t have it
reviews.review_description: Best game for the week 5 stars

I think the update dropped today, and it sucks that I can't do anything anymore it just kicks me out of the game when I join a map it kicks me out when I toggle music, and it doesn't work so any new players please don't support or download the game plus they just copied Gorilla Tag and put mods in it and they get lots of people joining the game so please don't download the game. 42  out of 1 stars, huh out of 43 1 down and saying it's good.
The game had atleast 20 people online per day when I played now only 0 players
I love it but I can't join the discord

I got banned  perm all cus of some  mosa boost  will hey owner  and mods if yall  don't  want us using  mods then why are they in the game this  is the  worst fan game  I have  played  and I own a game and Mine is  better  and it has  a mod menu  and you can mod in infection

developer_response.body: they are in the game for private lobby use. stop complaining because you got banned and READ SOME BOARDS

reviews.review_title: Some people with stick are amazing
reviews.review_description: People are blinded by coolaid being nice in game and not seeing how much of a dead beat owner he is he doesn’t care about the game he should quit forever he called me the n word he demoted me when his friend said the n word it’s just stupid how no one can see how toxic he is - crossjr, cross, wando
I love this game so much I hope I get mod five stars

This game has a nice community and barely any toxic players the mods dont abuse power and are almost always online. The music and cosmetic selection is wonderful with the spring cleaning update it's nice and peaceful especially when your listening to tek it
